title: Filter tasks by status

story.i_want_to: filter my task list to show only pending or only completed tasks
story.so_that: I can focus on what's left to do or review what I've accomplished

rationale: As the task list grows, showing everything at once becomes noisy. Filtering lets users see exactly what they need — pending tasks when planning their day, or done tasks when reviewing progress.

acceptance_criteria.description: Running `todo list --pending` shows only tasks with status 'pending'.
Running `todo list --done` shows only tasks with status 'done'.
Running `todo list` (no filter) continues to show all tasks.
When a filter returns no results, the app prints 'No {pending|done} tasks. Run `todo list` to see all tasks.' instead of an empty table.
The list header/format is consistent whether filtered or not.
If both --done and --pending flags are provided, the app prints 'Error: Cannot use --done and --pending together. Use `todo list` to see all tasks.' to stderr and exits with code 1.
If an unrecognized flag is passed (e.g., `todo list --completed`), the app prints 'Error: Unknown option "--completed". Available filters: --done, --pending' to stderr and exits with code 1.
Running `todo list --all` is accepted as a synonym for `todo list` with no filter, showing all tasks.
When a filter is active, the summary line includes context about total tasks: e.g., 'Showing 2 pending tasks (5 total).'

test_cases.name: Filter pending shows only pending tasks
preconditions: tmp_dir with tasks.json containing 2 pending and 1 done task

test_cases.name: Filter done shows only completed tasks
preconditions: tmp_dir with tasks.json containing 2 pending and 1 done task

test_cases.name: Filter with no matching tasks shows helpful message
preconditions: tmp_dir with tasks.json containing only pending tasks

test_cases.name: No filter shows all tasks
preconditions: tmp_dir with tasks.json containing 2 pending and 1 done task

test_cases.name: Conflicting flags show error
expected_results: stderr contains 'Error: Cannot use --done and --pending together.'

test_cases.name: Unknown flag shows error with available options
--all flag shows all tasks
preconditions: tmp_dir with tasks.json containing 2 pending and 1 done task

test_cases.name: Filtered list shows total context in summary
preconditions: tmp_dir with tasks.json containing 3 pending and 2 done tasks

technical_notes: Add optional status_filter parameter to list_tasks function
Validate that no unknown flags (strings starting with --) are passed
Filter: [t for t in tasks if t['status'] == filter] when filter is set
This extends US-1.3 list functionality — modify, don't duplicate
Update help text to show filter options: 'list [--done|--pending|--all]'
